newsSinceJun6: No material company news since June 6, 2026. The IPS leadership transition (Mark Klossner named EVP & President, succeeding retiring Jerry Morton) was announced June 1, outside the window. The ~$735M E-Pod data-center order book dates to the Feb 2026 Q4'25 release. Only new item is bullish fund-letter commentary recirculating June 8-9 (Yahoo/Insider Monkey), which raises visibility/crowding rather than adding fundamental evidence. Day move -0.71% is noise.

sources.label: Insider Monkey / Yahoo Finance - What Makes Regal Rexnord (RRX) an Attractive Investment Choice (Jun 8-9, 2026)
StockTitan - Regal Rexnord names Mark Klossner EVP & President, IPS (Jun 1, 2026)
Business News Today - Regal Rexnord secures $735M in data center E-Pod orders (Feb 2026)
StockTitan RRX news feed (checked for Jun 6-9 items)

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold at 27 with slight negative drift: no new fundamental evidence since June 6, but recirculating bullish fund-letter coverage after a +43% YTD run erodes the 'hidden, under-owned' premise this residual-alpha page rewards. Yesterday was a hold and nothing today justifies a fresh move.
verdicts.bull: Delevan inductors/transformers plus the $735M E-Pod switchgear order book give RRX genuine tight-supply, central-node exposure that the market still files under 'cyclical industrial'.
verdicts.neutral: At $13.9B cap and +43% YTD, the AI-passives angle is partially priced; the stock drifts with industrial sentiment until E-Pod shipments start in early 2027.
verdicts.bear: Growing sell-side and fund-letter visibility means the mispricing is closing; any industrial-cycle wobble or E-Pod execution slip hits a name that has already rerated.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: E-Pod data-center order momentum updates and initial shipment confirmation into early 2027; Delevan passives demand commentary.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding after the YTD rerating - residual alpha decays as the AI angle becomes consensus.

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold at 51: yesterday's verdict already moved the name down to reconcile with the adjusted score, and no information since June 6 changes its network position. Motors, drives, switchgear and power transmission remain a real but second-order node in cooling, robotics and data-center power.
verdicts.bull: The E-Pod switchgear push and data-center HVAC/automation demand keep upgrading RRX's centrality in the AI power chain beyond a pure industrial-recovery story.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but unchanged - Regal is still more a cyclical industrial synergy story with AI optionality than a core AI node; rank 51 with Medium conviction fits.
verdicts.bear: If industrial recovery stalls or the CEO succession (Pinkham through June 30) introduces strategic drift, the AI-adjacent narrative will not carry a $13.9B mid-cap on its own.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Industrial recovery data, synergy delivery, and E-Pod/data-center order conversion through 2026.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Cyclical end-market softness plus leadership transition risk diluting execution on the data-center pivot.
